# HelloWorld server performance test with ultra-aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts to test performance limits
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=400ms
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=300ms 
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=250ms

# Start server with minimal startup time allowance
exec timeout 8s go run . &
wait 80ms

# Test rapid greeting generation
cat > rapid_greeting.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Speed"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 400ms echo "$(<rapid_greeting.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hello, Speed!'

# Test rapid fortune retrieval
cat > rapid_fortune.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "fortune",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 400ms echo "$(<rapid_fortune.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'tree|future|journey|success|started|innovation|life|dream|moment|think'

# Test rapid language listing
cat > rapid_languages.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "list_languages",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 400ms echo "$(<rapid_languages.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Supported languages'

# Test rapid greeting with fortune (more complex operation)
cat > rapid_complex.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting_with_fortune",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Flash",
      "language": "spanish"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 400ms echo "$(<rapid_complex.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hola, Flash!'
stdout 'Your fortune:'

# Test rapid sequential operations
bash 'start=$(date +%s%N); timeout 200ms echo "$(<rapid_greeting.json)" | mcpcat - > /dev/null; timeout 200ms echo "$(<rapid_fortune.json)" | mcpcat - > /dev/null; end=$(date +%s%N); duration=$((($end - $start) / 1000000)); echo "2-op duration: ${duration}ms"; test $duration -lt 600'

# Test multiple rapid greetings
bash 'timeout 300ms echo "$(<rapid_greeting.json)" | mcpcat - | grep -q "Hello, Speed" && timeout 300ms echo "$(<rapid_greeting.json)" | mcpcat - | grep -q "Hello, Speed" && timeout 300ms echo "$(<rapid_greeting.json)" | mcpcat - | grep -q "Hello, Speed"'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f rapid_greeting.json rapid_fortune.json rapid_languages.json rapid_complex.json
